subcodes.first_line: ...When the friends do not endeavor to spread the message, they fail to remember God befittingly, and will not witness the tokens of assistance
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفوس تا در ترويج نکوشند بذکر اللّه مشغول و مألوف نيز کما ينبغی نگردند و آثار مدد
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @being a channel for the Holy Spirit in teaching the Cause
